column1: # Twilight Struggle canonical country data - Deluxe Edition
# Sources: GMT Games Twilight Struggle Deluxe Edition rulebook (setup diagram p.7
#   Assigned in region order (matching ts::Region enum in cpp/tscore/types.hpp):
#   Special superpower anchor ids at end (not normal board countries):
#     75 = USA homeland anchor (used for adjacency only)
#     76 = USSR homeland anchor (used for adjacency only)
# region: Europe | Asia | MiddleEast | CentralAmerica | SouthAmerica | Africa | SoutheastAsia
#   SoutheastAsia is the TS scoring sub-region (scored by Southeast Asia Scoring card).
#   Countries in SoutheastAsia do NOT count for Asia Scoring (only SE Asia Scoring).
#   EXCEPTION: South Korea and Japan are Asia (not SoutheastAsia) for scoring.
# is_battleground: true = worth extra VP in scoring; required for domination/control
# us_start_influence: starting US influence (per rulebook p.7 setup)
# Key setup uncertainties that need verification against physical rulebook:
#   in each game's SETUP block and applied via bracket-set — NOT pre-encoded here.
